status_decision: native residual rows retain guarded/blocked final classification

source_observations.origin_policy: apps/desktop/src/main/origin-policy.js allowlists packaged/file and approved dev renderer, denies unapproved navigation/window-open
source_observations.file_bridge: apps/desktop/src/main/fileBridge.js requires trusted gesture, rejects renderer bytes, permission-prechecks, and audits denied prechecks
source_observations.temp_preview: apps/desktop/src/main/tempPreview.js scopes temp previews and clears cache on logout/tenant switch/app quit
source_observations.deep_links: apps/desktop/src/main/deepLinks.js route-only parser denies action execution, invalid identifiers, and unknown query parameters
source_observations.notifications: apps/desktop/src/main/notifications.js turns notification click payloads into route-only deep-link intents
source_observations.updates: apps/desktop/src/main/updates.js requires signatures, disables public channel, and supports internal rollback in source controller

rowProofs.observed: Approved local dev renderer target and packaged file renderer are allowlisted.
Unapproved renderer, navigation, and window-open are denied by origin-policy guards.
File picker without trusted gesture throws USER_GESTURE_REQUIRED.
Renderer-supplied file/document bytes throw RENDERER_FILE_BYTES_FORBIDDEN before dialog/write.
Denied permission precheck throws PERMISSION_DENIED and records denied audit event.
Temp preview cache cleanup removed scoped preview on logout and recorded cleanup audit.

rowProofs.status_decision: BLOCKED remains BLOCKED / external desktop runtime receipt required
rowProofs.observed: Matter/document/task deep links parse to routeOnly intents with no action execution.
rowProofs.missing_runtime_receipt: OS protocol registration and packaged app route-open receipt

rowProofs.status_decision: BLOCKED remains BLOCKED / external auth runtime receipt required
rowProofs.observed: Auth callback deep link parses only when code, state, and issuer are present.
Forbidden action deep link throws FORBIDDEN_ACTION_LINK.
Invalid deep link route/query/id throws INVALID_IDENTIFIER.

rowProofs.observed: Notification forbidden action route throws FORBIDDEN_ACTION_LINK; payload keys are body, id, routeUrl, templateId, title.
